title: Sports
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Mick Cronin Ejects His Own Player For Committing Hard Foul in UCLA's Loss to MSU
items.description: Mick Cronin found a new way to express frustration, ejecting his own player during UCLA's blowout loss to Michigan State on Tuesday.

items.title: 4 Takeaways From Michigan's Big Ten Win Over Purdue
items.description: Elliot Cadeau scored 17 points in Michigan's 91-80 win over Purdue, the Wolverines' 21st victory of the season by double digits.

items.title: Villanova Outlasts Xavier in Overtime
items.description: Villanova earns sixth straight win with overtime victory against Xavier on Tuesday.

items.title: College Football Offseason Buzz: Michigan Loses 2027 Quarterback Commit
items.description: The college football news cycle never stops. With that in mind, here's a tracker of offseason buzz across the sport.

items.title: Men's College Basketball 2025-26 Undefeated Teams Tracker: Miami (OH) Humming
items.description: Only one men's college basketball team remains undefeated in the 2025-2026 season.

items.title: MLBPA head Clark resigns after internal probe
items.description: MLBPA executive director Tony Clark resigned Tuesday after an internal investigation revealed an inappropriate relationship with his sister-in-law, wh...

items.title: Shiffrin aims for Olympic gold in slalom -- and this time, she's the favorite
items.description: Mikaela Shiffrin was not expected to medal in Sunday's giant slalom. On Wednesday, she's the front-runner to win gold in slalom.

items.title: Transfer rumors, news: PSG, Liverpool join race for Villa star Rogers
items.description: Paris Saint-Germain and Liverpool have joined the race to sign Aston Villa attacking midfielder Morgan Rogers. Transfer Talk has the latest.

items.title: Texas Tech upset by ASU as Toppin exits with injury
items.description: Texas Tech star forward JT Toppin injured his lower right leg while driving to the basket with 6:03 remaining in Tuesday night's upset loss at Arizona...

items.title: F1 testing LIVE: Charles Leclerc sets early pace from Lando Norris as crucial final week begins
items.description: Follow live updates and analysis of the second week of Formula 1's preseason test in Bahrain as the 2026 cars take to the track.
